meaning: n.摇篮,发源地,支船架vt.将...放在摇篮内
examples: She rocked the baby to sleep in its cradle.
The baby was rocked to sleep in a cradle.
A cradle is such a nice homely thing to have about a house.
Panasonic has also upgraded the desktop cradle to improve charge time to three hours.
They declared independence for a region they recognize as Azawad, the cradle of their nomadic civilization.
